last_angles: Identity — under pressure, the person executing the strategy changes; consistency requires removing human execution from the equation
Fear — 'the bot doesn't understand context' objection flipped using the real June 2026 NFP shock that dropped XAUUSD 11%
Educational — how cortisol / prefrontal cortex shutdown during NFP/FOMC destroys manual execution; bot doesn't have a nervous system
Curiosity — XAUUSD dropped 11% in one month (June 2026): traders with pre-defined rules survived; those who improvised didn't
Social proof — Marco R., 2 years XAUUSD trader, had the strategy but kept moving stop losses; bot enforced the rules for him
Brand narrative — Jess Trading built to protect the trader's edge from themselves, born from watching great traders lose due to execution failure
Scarcity — XAUUSD MT5 bot, backtested strategy, $197 one-time payment, onboarding closes June 30
